summary: Comprehensive testing of BM Hospitality Admin Panel (Iteration 3). All 22 backend admin API tests passed 100%. All frontend admin panel features verified: login, dashboard stats, image manager (upload/delete), inquiries, subscriptions, logout. Main site WhatsApp float button and Instagram link verified correct.
critical_code_review_comments: Admin authentication uses sha256 hash for token generation - secure implementation
All admin endpoints properly check Bearer token authorization
Image upload supports multipart form data with section/label query params
Soft delete implemented for images (is_deleted flag)
Object storage integration with Emergent is working correctly (real storage, not mocked)
WhatsApp float button positioned correctly at bottom-right with proper aria-label for accessibility
Instagram link simplified to clean URL without tracking params

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all admin panel UI and integrations verified)

seed_data_creation: Test images created via API tests with TEST_ prefix (TEST_Image_Upload, TEST_Delete_Me, TEST_Serve_Test, etc. for various sections)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All admin panel features verified working. Backend APIs: POST /api/admin/login, GET /api/admin/stats, GET /api/admin/inquiries, GET /api/admin/subscriptions, GET /api/admin/images, POST /api/admin/upload, DELETE /api/admin/images/{id}, GET /api/files/{path}. Admin token stored in localStorage as 'bm_admin_token'. Image upload uses Emergent object storage (real integration). WhatsApp float button uses +91 8329416113 number. Instagram URL: https://www.instagram.com/bm_hospitality/

features_verified.admin_login_page: PASS - /admin route shows login form with password field
features_verified.admin_login_correct_password: PASS - Nawabi@2025 logs in successfully, returns token
features_verified.admin_dashboard_stats: PASS - Shows total inquiries, subscriptions, uploaded images, flight inquiries
features_verified.admin_image_manager: PASS - Upload form with section selector, label field, Choose & Upload button
features_verified.admin_image_upload: PASS - POST /api/admin/upload with multipart form data works
features_verified.admin_image_grid: PASS - Displays uploaded images with section badges and file sizes
features_verified.admin_image_delete: PASS - DELETE /api/admin/images/{id} works, image removed from grid
features_verified.admin_image_filter_sections: PASS - All section filter tabs present (Hero Banner, Domestic Packages, etc.)
features_verified.admin_inquiries_page: PASS - Shows all inquiry submissions with type badges
features_verified.admin_logout: PASS - Logout button clears token and redirects to login
features_verified.whatsapp_float_button: PASS - Visible at bottom-right of main site, opens WhatsApp with pre-filled message
features_verified.main_site_working: PASS - Hero, header, forms, newsletter popup all functional
features_verified.file_serving: PASS - GET /api/files/{path} serves uploaded images correctly
